name: ml-automation-marketplace
description: End-to-end ML automation plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: ml-automation
plugins.description: End-to-end ML automation workflow with specialized agents, reusable ML utilities, and quality gates for EDA, feature engineering, training, evaluation, and deployment.

plugins.name: ml-automation-core
plugins.description: Core ML automation plugin with Extension Protocol. 10 specialized agents, shared report bus, reflection gates, MLOps registry, hook points for extensions, and quality gates.

plugins.name: ml-automation-mmm
plugins.description: Media Mix Modeling extension for ml-automation. Bayesian MMM with adstock, saturation, channel attribution, and client-ready reporting.
